calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, June 05, 2008:
Paul Arshawsky, attorney for plaintiff John Stewart Company; Cassandra Coats, representative, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Erin Dougherty, Esquire by limited scope representation for defendant Frank Anderson, who is also present

Settlement conference is held. Case is settled. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 170 Cashmere Street, #E, San Francisco, CA 94124.
June 9, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
